title: The Spies of Scientology
summary: This interview discusses espionage activities connected to the Church of Scientology, specifically revealing that Ingo Swann allegedly acted as a spy for the Church while working in the Office of Naval Intelligence's remote viewing program, reporting internal operations to the Guardian's Office.
programs_mentioned: Office of Naval Intelligence remote viewing program

key_claims.claim: Ingo Swann was filing reports with the Guardian's Office in the UK about the entire internal operations of the Office of Naval Intelligence remote viewing program
Ingo Swann was acting as a spy for the Church of Scientology against the Office of Naval Intelligence
Ingo Swann's loyalty to Scientology was because he was a high-level Clear
The guest was asked to be the attorney for L. Ron Hubbard
The guest was offered access to every single document in the internal files of the Church of Scientology worldwide
